description: Canonical Task 14 RMFT-projected anchor dataset contract. Freezes anchor, neighborhood, and bridge sample roles around projected RMFT points in the full gauge-fixed 7+1 pairing representation without reverting to the old delta_from_baseline_meV 5-control box as the canonical pairing source.

frozen_direction_contract.supported_spread_regime: narrow named-mode-centered spread only, half_width <= pi/32
frozen_direction_contract.diagnostic_raw_angles: excluded from the primary truth-grade pool unless a later task explicitly promotes them

pairing_source_contract.canonical_source_summary: Primary pairing coverage must come from projected RMFT anchor points, local neighborhoods around those anchors, and sparse bridge samples between nearby anchors.

neighborhood.role: small local perturbation around one projected RMFT anchor

bridge.role: sparse interpolation-style point between nearby projected anchors

legacy_noncanonical_sources.delta_from_baseline_meV: forbidden as the canonical main source

must_report: forward metadata family used for projection and generation
anchor, neighborhood, and bridge row counts
proof that delta_from_baseline_meV is not the canonical main pairing source
proof that symmetry labels are not used as training labels
